title: UFO truth will finally be revealed as new government website is spotted amid calls for disclosure
description: The White House has registered the domain 'aliens.gov,' sparking fresh speculation that President Donald Trump's long-awaited UFO disclosure may be imminent. The domain, linked to the Executive Office of the President, was flagged on Wednesday by an automated tracker of federal websites. However, it is also listed in the government's official .gov registry maintained by the Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency. Registry records show it was recently added under the White House Office alongside other official government sites, confirming it as a legitimate federal web address, though its purpose has not been publicly disclosed. title: Mystery Deepens As Colleague Of Missing Air Force General Linked To UFO Research Has Also Vanished
description: Just when the story about missing retired U.S. Air Force Major General William Neil McCasland couldn’t get much stranger, another twist pops up. It turns out that McCasland’s former colleague, Monica Reza, also vanished under mysterious circumstances last summer. title: Mystery as colleague of missing USAF general linked to UFO research has also vanished
description: A retired US Air Force General "linked to UFO research" went missing last month, and it has now come to light that his former colleague has likewise vanished under "strange circumstances"

title: Donald Trump UFO Files: Former Defence Chief Reveals 'Satellite Proof' Of Alien Craft
description: Former Pentagon official Christopher Mellon says he has seen 'shocking' satellite images and videos of apparent non-human craft, urging Trump and Congress to push UFO transparency.
